'70757P-2.50x10.0x11.0')

```sql
select * from #t1

select 
	   p.ID, 
	   TRANSACTION_ID, 
	   it.[DESCRIPTION], 
	   WORKORDER_TYPE, 
	   WORKORDER_BASE_ID, 
	   WORKORDER_LOT_ID, 
	   WORKORDER_SPLIT_ID, 
	   WORKORDER_SUB_ID, 
	   OPERATION_SEQ_NO, 
	   REQ_PIECE_NO, 
	   CUST_ORDER_ID, 
	   CUST_ORDER_LINE_NO, 
	   PURC_ORDER_ID, 
	   PURC_ORDER_LINE_NO, 
	   [TYPE], 
	   CLASS, 
	   QTY, 
	   COSTED_QTY, 
	   ACT_MATERIAL_COST, 
	   ACT_LABOR_COST, 
	   ACT_BURDEN_COST, 
	   ACT_SERVICE_COST,
	   isnull(cast(TRANSACTION_DATE as date),'') as TransDate, 
	   isnull(year(TRANSACTION_DATE),'') as [Year],
	   isnull(datename(mm,TRANSACTION_DATE),'') as [Month]
from	   #t1 p
left outer join 
	   INVENTORY_TRANS IT
	   on p.id = it.part_id
	   and it.transaction_date >= '9/15/2015'
--where   transaction_date >= '9/15/2015'
order by p.id, transaction_date


select * from INVENTORY_TRANS IT where part_id = '15-5PHP025X1.50X10.20'

```
